description: Complete backend API implementation for all modules: Admin CRUD operations, Trainer module (batch management, attendance, evaluation, mock interviews, assignments, resources, analytics), Counsellor module (student management, fee tracking, alerts, follow-ups), Student module (dashboard, attendance marking, performance view, resources, notifications), and core system engines (batch management, module/course management, attendance engine with QR generation, evaluation engine, reporting engine with PDF/Excel export).
steps: Create backend/src/routes/admin.ts - Admin CRUD routes: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE for students, trainers, counsellors, batches, modules. Assignment routes: POST /api/admin/assign-trainer-batch, POST /api/admin/assign-counsellor-student, POST /api/admin/assign-module-batch. Dashboard route: GET /api/admin/dashboard (total students, active batches, attendance overview, fee collection status, performance insights).
Create backend/src/services/admin.service.ts - Business logic for all admin operations including dashboard aggregation queries using Prisma.

Create backend/src/routes/trainer.ts - Trainer routes: GET /api/trainer/batches (assigned batches), GET /api/trainer/batches/:id/students (student overview with snapshot data), GET /api/trainer/batches/:id/modules (modules for batch), POST /api/trainer/lectures (create lecture session - start lecture), PUT /api/trainer/lectures/:id/end (end lecture - records duration, triggers attendance window), GET /api/trainer/lectures (lecture history).

Create backend/src/routes/attendance.ts - Attendance routes: POST /api/attendance/generate-qr (generate dynamic QR with session ID, timestamp, encrypted token - changes every 10 seconds), POST /api/attendance/mark-qr (student scans QR - validates session, time window 2-5 min after lecture end, token freshness), POST /api/attendance/mark-online (online attendance - validates student joined lecture, active duration threshold), GET /api/attendance/history/:studentId, GET /api/attendance/batch/:batchId/:lectureId.

Create backend/src/services/attendance.service.ts - QR generation logic (crypto-based token with session ID + timestamp + HMAC), QR validation (check token age <= 10s, session validity, time window), online attendance validation (check join time, active duration), attendance statistics calculation.

Create backend/src/routes/evaluation.ts - Evaluation routes: POST /api/evaluation/marks (add marks - theory/practical/project), GET /api/evaluation/marks/:studentId (get student marks), GET /api/evaluation/marks/batch/:batchId (batch marks overview), PUT /api/evaluation/marks/:id (update marks).

Create backend/src/routes/mock-interview.ts - Mock interview routes: POST /api/mock-interviews (create evaluation with communication, technical, confidence scores + feedback), GET /api/mock-interviews/:studentId (student's mock interview history), GET /api/mock-interviews/batch/:batchId.

Create backend/src/routes/assignments.ts - Assignment routes: POST /api/assignments (create with file upload via multer), GET /api/assignments/batch/:batchId, POST /api/assignments/:id/submit (student submission with file), GET /api/assignments/:id/submissions (trainer view), PUT /api/submissions/:id/grade (trainer grades submission).

Create backend/src/routes/resources.ts - Resource routes: POST /api/resources (upload notes/materials with file), GET /api/resources/module/:moduleId, GET /api/resources/batch/:batchId, DELETE /api/resources/:id.

Create backend/src/routes/counsellor.ts - Counsellor routes: GET /api/counsellor/students (assigned students with progress, attendance, performance), GET /api/counsellor/students/:id/fees (fee details), POST /api/counsellor/fees/payment (record payment), GET /api/counsellor/alerts (low attendance, poor performance alerts from trainers), POST /api/counsellor/follow-ups (add follow-up notes), GET /api/counsellor/dashboard (active students, fee collection, at-risk students).
Create backend/src/services/counsellor.service.ts - Fee calculation logic, alert aggregation, at-risk student identification (attendance < 75% or marks < 40%).

Create backend/src/routes/student.ts - Student routes: GET /api/student/dashboard (batch info, trainer, module progress, attendance %), GET /api/student/attendance (attendance history with stats), GET /api/student/marks (all marks by module with theory/practical/project breakdown), GET /api/student/mock-interviews (mock interview history and scores), GET /api/student/assignments (assignments with submission status), GET /api/student/resources (available learning resources), GET /api/student/lectures (lecture history with topics), GET /api/student/notifications.

Create backend/src/routes/notifications.ts - Notification routes: GET /api/notifications (user's notifications), PUT /api/notifications/:id/read (mark as read), POST /api/notifications/announce (create announcement - admin/trainer only).

Create backend/src/routes/reports.ts - Reporting routes: GET /api/reports/attendance (attendance report with filters - batch, date range, student), GET /api/reports/marks (marks report), GET /api/reports/batch-progress (batch progress report), GET /api/reports/export/:type (export as PDF or Excel - use pdfkit and exceljs packages).
Create backend/src/services/reports.service.ts - Report generation logic with PDF (using pdfkit) and Excel (using exceljs) export functionality.
Create backend/src/routes/index.ts - Central route mounting file that registers all route modules with appropriate role guards.
Create backend/src/middleware/validate.ts - Zod-based request validation middleware factory.
Create backend/src/middleware/upload.ts - Multer configuration for file uploads (assignments, resources, submissions) with file type/size validation. Store in uploads/ directory.
Add pdfkit and exceljs to backend dependencies for report generation.
Create backend/src/tests/admin.test.ts - Tests for admin CRUD operations and dashboard.
Create backend/src/tests/trainer.test.ts - Tests for trainer module including lecture management.
Create backend/src/tests/attendance.test.ts - Tests for QR generation, validation, and attendance marking.
acceptance_criteria: All backend route files compile without TypeScript errors
Admin CRUD endpoints work for all entity types (students, trainers, counsellors, batches, modules)
Trainer can start/end lectures and the attendance window is correctly enforced
QR-based attendance generates tokens and validates them within the time window
Online attendance validates join time and active duration
Marks can be added for theory, practical, and project types
Mock interview evaluations store communication, technical, confidence scores
Counsellor can view assigned students, track fees, and see alerts
Student can view their dashboard, attendance, marks, and resources
Reports can be generated and exported as PDF/Excel
Backend test suite passes with npx jest
